FIFO Access

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x70
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Enables FIFO access test mode so the master can write the RX FIFO and read the TX FIFO. Enabling or disabling this mode resets both FIFOs. Only valid when FIFO_ACCESS is configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] far rw 0x0 FAR

Field Descriptions

far - FAR

FIFO Access Mode Enable. 0=disabled, 1=enabled.
